bot.role: Pattern B Resurrection #2: Connors RSI(2)。2026-06-27 user 要請で復帰。

bot.name: Earnings Universal

bot.role: Earnings universal surprise (502 ticker universe). 検証 2018-2025 n=2156 events: pos>=10% / hold=5d Sh+1.31 win 57.3% / neg<=-5% LONG (dip-buy) Sh+1.33 win 57.3%. earnings_bot (LLY/NVDA H3 のみ) の上位互換、universe 502× + bidirectional。daily phase auto、yasuda_quant/data/earnings_estimate/*_history.csv 経由。sleeve 1.5%×max 8 = 12% NetLiq。

bot.name: Buyback XS Contrarian
bot.subtitle: yasuda_quant/data/buyback の trailing 12mo Repurchase/mktcap で 503 ticker ranking、bottom decile 10 銘柄 monthly rebal、21d hold。教科書と逆 = 低 buyback 銘柄が outperform。2026-06-17 SINGLE-TEST FLAG-D paper 配備

stats.annual_est: backtest +5.30%/63d bot decile vs -0.60% top, live想定 0.3-0.5x
stats.dual_sieve_2026_06_20: A1 BOTH_PASS 確認 (X1) +7.41%→+9.84% (excl 2020-2023 で強化) → Tier A 昇格 (元 D)

bot.role: buyback XS contrarian (LOW buyback = BUY). yasuda_quant/data/buyback の trailing 12mo Repurchase Of Capital Stock / mktcap で全 ticker ranking、bottom decile 10銘柄を月次 rebalance、21d hold。backtest 503 ticker × 19 quarters で top-bot decile diff = -5.90% t=-2.99 (single test FLAG-D 候補)。教科書と逆方向 = 低 buyback 銘柄が outperform。sleeve 1% × max 10 = 10% NetLiq、paper-only、user 2026-06-17 配備承認。caveat: single test、multi-period sign-consistency 未検証、live 想定 Sh +0.3-0.5。

bot.subtitle: fundamentals.csv の returnOnEquity 上位 20% basket、bull regime (>=3/4) のみ entry、top 10 銘柄 quarterly rebal、63d hold。walk-forward 9/10 yr positive (90%)、avg diff +12.86%/yr。2026-06-19 FLAG-C 候補 paper 配備

stats.annual_est: backtest +12.86%/yr avg basket diff, 0.3-0.5x retention → +4-6%/yr at 10% sleeve
stats.r6: WF 9/10 yr positive, 2020 covid のみ -9.39%
stats.placebo: snapshot ROE 限界、historical で真の walk-forward 必須

bot.role: Quality factor (ROE) XS、bull regime gated. yasuda_quant/data/fundamentals.csv の returnOnEquity 上位 20% basket、bull regime (≥3/4 conditions: SPY>200d MA, VIX<25, SPY 20d ret>0, 10Y-3M spread>-0.5%) のみ entry。top 10 銘柄を quarterly (63d) rebal、63d hold。walk-forward 9/10 years positive (90%)、avg diff +12.86%/yr。sleeve 1% × max 10 = 10% NetLiq、paper 配備。user 2026-06-19 承認。caveat: snapshot ROE 使用、historical ROE での真の walk-forward 必須。

bot.name: Trend Follower (Clenow)
bot.subtitle: SPY/QQQ/IWM/EFA/TLT/GLD/DBC (7 ETF) を 100d MA + inverse 30d std weighting で rotation。weekly rebal 5% hysteresis。backtest 9yr Sh +0.98, maxDD -24%。2020 COVID +35% / 2022 bear -8.5% で defensive。bull/bear 両 regime 生存設計。2026-06-20 paper 配備

stats.dual_sieve_2026_06_20: E4 BOTH_PASS 確認 Sh 0.98→1.10 ann +12.1%→+10.6% → Tier A 昇格 (元 C)

bot.role: Clenow-style vol-normalized trend rotation. Universe SPY/QQQ/IWM/EFA/TLT/GLD/DBC (7 ETF), close > 100d MA = include, inverse 30d std weighting, weekly rebal with 5% hysteresis. backtest (E4) 9 years: Sharpe +0.98 vs SPY +0.90, maxDD -24% vs -34%. 2020 COVID +35% (SPY +18%), 2022 bear -8.5% (SPY -18%) = bull/bear 両 regime で生存。defensive complement role。sleeve 10% NetLiq total。user 2026-06-20 配備承認。

cards.text: exit 日は entry + bot ごとの hold_days で計算。実際の SELL は bot 各々の戦略ロジックに依存 (signal / stop loss / 時間切れ)。

7/15 live 昇格候補ランキング:
  #1: M11 Top5 Momentum (combo 1.65)
  #2: B5 PEAD long (combo 1.50)
  #3: C3 Connors RSI2 (combo 1.41)
  #4: O1 SPY overnight (combo 1.31)
  #5: B3 52w breakout (combo 1.29)
7/15 live deploy まで 5 日。3 週間 paper 観測後 top 3 を選抜、$13k 投入。W3 は size 不足のため paper 継続予定。
Pattern B "Resurrection" = 2020-2023 除外でも生き残った dual sieve BOTH_PASS 戦略。詳細は scripts/dual_sieve.py / rd_untapped/X3-X12 系列。選定基準は edge type 独立 + $13k で実 deploy 可能 + forward-look bias 最小。
FLAT (0 < spread < +1%): 中立、特に bias なし。
